summary: Frontend-only verification completed for Royal Spark category-page cleanup and product-detail transition. Requested flows passed on public preview URL.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for the requested frontend scope.
Keep validating category-grid consistency if product seed volume changes across categories.
critical_code_review_comments: ShopPage renders only results content and omits filter/sidebar containers, matching clean category-page requirement.
ProductCard links image/name/view-detail controls to /shop/:slug, and ProductDetailPage renders large gallery image plus full description with clear readability.
Catalog/product data is MOCKED via local seeded dataset; Shopify readiness endpoint is informational only (MOCKED integration context).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on public URL: /shop?category=Rings shows clean grid (no sidebar/filter), card heights are consistent in sampled cards, product image click opens full detail page, header category links (Chains and Moissanite) still navigate correctly, and /shop?category=Necklaces shows Coming Soon empty state.
rca of the issue: No defect reproduced in requested scope. DOM checks and UI navigation confirmed expected behavior for category layout, detail transition, and empty-state handling.
